title: ZENO Reinforced Garden Hose Pipe with Spray Nozzle Fittings, 30M Garden Hose, Wear and Tear Resistant, Leak and Burst Proof, Kink Free, Easy Storage
features: REINFORCED FOR MAXIMUM DURABILITY - Constructed with high-quality materials, this garden hose is built to withstand heavy use, offering exceptional resistance to wear, tears, leaks, and bursts for long-lasting reliability.

KINK-FREE DESIGN FOR UNINTERRUPTED FLOW - Say goodbye to frustrating tangles and interruptions. The kink-free design ensures smooth and consistent water flow, making it ideal for all watering and cleaning tasks.
30M LENGTH FOR EXTENSIVE COVERAGE - With a generous 30-metre length, this hose provides extended reach, perfect for watering large gardens, cleaning driveways, or washing cars with minimal hassle.

ADJUSTABLE SPRAY NOZZLE INCLUDED - Comes with a versatile spray nozzle offering multiple spray patterns, from gentle misting to powerful jets, catering to all your gardening, cleaning, and washing needs.
EASY TO STORE AND HANDLE - Lightweight yet highly durable, this hose is easy to roll up and store neatly when not in use. Its compact storage design keeps your outdoor space tidy and organised.
